suggested_fixes: Add CHECK_CONTIGUOUS macros in check_inputs to enforce contiguity early.
Optionally add a check for d in the expected range: TORCH_CHECK(d >= 3584 && d <= 4608, "d must be in [3584, 4608]");
warnings: Input tensors are not explicitly checked for contiguity in check_inputs, but .contiguous() is called afterwards; this may cause unnecessary copies if tensors are already contiguous.
The d dimension is not explicitly constrained to [3584, 4608]; any square d is accepted, which may be broader than required.
